heading: Omitted
label: 653 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , which related to settlement of claims notwithstanding statutes of limitation, amount of decree, and set-off of payments, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.act May 18, 1928, ch. 624, § 345 Stat. 602
